title: Fodo Medoo

{{Quote|When a ship comes in I work straight through the day, but mostly I just pass the time playing Pazaak.|translated=1|Medoo to Revan|<ref name="KOTOR" />}}
'''Fodo Medoo''' was a [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Gambler/Legends|gambler]] who lived during the [[Jedi Civil War]] between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and [[Sith Empire/Legends|Sith Empire]]. In [[3956 BBY]], he worked loading cargo for the [[Czerka Arms/Legends|Czerka Corporation]] on the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]]. He spent his [[Time/Legends|time]] off playing the card game [[Pazaak/Legends|pazaak]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|Oh, I'm not actually considered a real employee. At least, not enough to get one of those uniforms they strut around in. I just load cargo.|translated=1|Medoo to Revan|<ref name="KOTOR" />}}
Fodo Medoo was a [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] [[Gambler/Legends|gambler]] who lived during the [[Jedi Civil War]] between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and [[Sith Empire/Legends|Sith Empire]].<ref name="KOTOR" /> [[Gender/Legends|He]] was informally working for the [[Czerka Arms/Legends|Czerka Corporation]] on the [[Forest/Legends|forested]]<ref name="KOTOR" /> [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]<ref name="DB">{{DB|location|kashyyyk|Kashyyyk}}</ref> [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]], known by the corporation as Edean. Medoo worked loading [[Starship/Legends|ships]] with cargo when they arrived on the world. He mostly spent his [[Time/Legends|time]] playing the card game [[Pazaak/Legends|pazaak]] when no ships were present. Medoo heard rumors of the [[Destruction of Taris|attack]] on the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Ecumenopolis/Legends|ecumenopolis]] of [[Taris/Legends|Taris]], but didn't pay much attention since he didn't know anyone from the planet.<ref name="KOTOR" />

{{Gamemechanics}}
In [[3956 BBY]],<ref name="Date">''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' places the events of ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'', in which Fodo Medoo appears, in [[3956 BBY]].</ref> former [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Revan/Legends|Revan]], [[Jedi training/Legends|retrained]] as a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] and suffering from [[Amnesia/Legends|amnesia]], arrived on Kashyyyk during his search for the [[Rakata/Legends|Rakatan]] [[Star Map]]s. Revan approached Medoo on the landing pad and asking the Rodian about himself and the planet. Medoo described his work and explained that he didn't know much about the planet, directing Revan to the Czerka [[Administrator/Legends|administrator]] [[Janos Wertka]]. He mentioned that regardless of who won the ongoing war, they would always need someone to load cargo.

Revan agreed to play pazaak with him with low stakes. Medoo decided to continue playing after four losses and increased the wager. Medoo lost another four games to Revan and raised the stakes again. He said that he should know to quit, but he didn't have anything else to do nor anywhere else to spend his [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]]. Medoo noted that Revan was the most challenging player he had played against in a long time, as there weren't many pazaak players near the dock. After a ninth loss, Medoo was out of spending credits and instead wagered extra pazaak cards. Revan won yet again, his tenth win in a row. Medoo gave Revan the promised cards, mentioning that the games were the best fun he had recently. He noted that ten wins was considered a tournament victory by some, but that he never made it to such tournaments. The Rodian then told Revan that he had to return to work and left the landing pad.<ref name="KOTOR" />
{{Endgame}}

Following Revan's exploits on the planet and the [[Wookiee Chieftain]] [[Chuundar]]{{'s}} [[Death/Legends|death]], the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiees]] of [[Rwookrrorro/Legends|Rwookrrorro]] [[Rebellion on Kashyyyk/Legends|rebelled]] against the Czerka Corporation, causing Czerka personnel, including Fodo Medoo to leave the area.<ref name="KOTOR" />

==Personality and traits==
{{Quote|I just figure that whatever is going on, whoever is in charge will still always need someone to load crates.|translated=1|Medoo to Revan|<ref name="KOTOR" />}}
Fodo Medoo was a Rodian male with [[Color/Legends|Copper]]-colored skin and black [[Eye/Legends|eyes]]. Medoo enjoyed playing pazaak during his time off, and often told people to never quit on a loss. He was relatively indifferent to the war, assuming that he would have a job regardless of which faction won. He believed that the Wookiees could call the planet whatever they wanted, but referred to it as Edean since the Czerka Corporation paid to name the local [[Hyperspace route/Legends|trade routes]].<ref name="KOTOR" />

==Equipment==
{{Quote|I don't really even have any more credits left to play... but if you want, I could put a few of my cards as my wager... You up for that?|translated=1|Medoo to Revan after his ninth loss|<ref name="KOTOR" />}}
Medoo wore green and teal [[Suit/Legends|suit]] with bronze-colored [[Boot/Legends|boots]], a brown harness, and a brown [[Utility belt/Legends|utility belt]] with a pouch and [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] [[Holster/Legends|holster]]. He carried a pazaak deck with several cards and an extra deck that he was looking to sell.<ref name="KOTOR" />

==Behind the scenes==
{{Quote|That's got to be rough, but things can change fast. You'll want to keep playing, I bet. Never quit on a loss.|translated=1|Medoo in potential dialogue if Revan loses|<ref name="KOTOR" />}}
Fodo Medoo appeared in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'', developed by [[BioWare]]. Interactions with him are optional and have no affect on plot, quests, or alignment. If the player does not have a pazaak deck Medoo will offer one that the player may buy for seventy-five credits or persuade him to give for free. He will also give the player a pamphlet containing the game's rules. If the player loses to Medoo, he will apologize and encourage Revan to not end on a loss.<ref name="KOTOR" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1st}}
